zh.Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England: 英國貝德福爾廷格利特
zh.Acton, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可阿克頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anna De Bures於1501年出生在英國素福爾可阿克頓時，她的父親Sir Robert de Bures25歲，母親Lady Joan Buck22歲。她和Robert Alyn至少有1個女兒。她去世於1558年在英國貝德福爾廷格利特享年57歲。

zh-hans.Acton, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可阿克頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anna De Bures于1501年出生在英国素福爾可阿克頓时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Bures25岁，母亲Lady Joan Buck22岁。她和Robert Alyn至少有1个女儿。她去世于1558年在英国貝德福爾廷格利特享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bures
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Czech and Slovak Milan, Jaroslav.
Czech and Slovak (Bureš): from a pet form of the old personal name Burian .
English (Essex): habitational name from Mount Bures (Essex) and adjacent Bures Saint Mary (Suffolk), both meaning ‘the cottages’, from Old English būr, plural būras.

variants.name: Burian
meanings: Czech and Slovak (also Burián); Hungarian (Burián); Polish and Romanian: from Burian, Burián, an old personal name apparently composed of bur ‘peasant’, a word of German origin (see Bauer and Bur ), and the name Jan (Slovak Ján) ‘John’. In Czech, the name Burian or Bur Jan denotes Saint John, a Christian martyr who lived in the 4th century in Rome and is venerated together with Saint Paul. Compare German Burhans and the name below.
North German: variant of   Burhans  , formed with the personal name   Jan   ‘John’ in place of its cognate   Hans  .

variants.name: Buresh
meanings: Americanized form of Czech and Slovak Bureš (see Bures ) and of their Germanized form Buresch (compare 2 below).

Americanized form of German (of Slavic origin) Buresch: from a short form of an Old Slavic personal name Burislav (composed of the elements bur, derived from buriti se ‘to stir up’ + slav, from slava ‘glory’). See also 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anna De Bures was born in 1501, in Acton, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir Robert de Bures, was 25 and her mother, Lady Joan Buck, was 22. She had at least 1 daughter with Robert Alyn. She died in 1558, in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anna De Bures est née en 1501, à Acton, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Bures, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Buck, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Robert Alyn. Elle est décédée en 1558, à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anna De Bures 1501 in Acton, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Bures 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan Buck 22. Sie hatte mit Robert Alyn mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1558 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anna De Bures è nata il nel 1501 nel Acton, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir Robert de Bures, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Joan Buck, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Robert Alyn. Morì nel 1558, nel Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Acton, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクアクトン
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anna De Buresが1501年にイギリススフォルクアクトンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Buresは25歳，母Lady Joan Buckは22歳であった。彼女はRobert Alynとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1558年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anna De Bures(이)가 1501년 영국 수폴크 악턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Bures(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan Buck(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Robert Alyn(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 영국 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Acton, Suffolk, England: Acton, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anna De Bures nasceu em 1501, em Acton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Bures, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Buck, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Robert Alyn. Ela faleceu em 1558, em Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anna De Bures родилась в 1501 г. в местности актон, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Bures было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Buck, 22. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Robert Alyn. Она умерла в 1558 г. в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anna De Bures nació en 1501, en Acton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Bures, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Buck, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Robert Alyn. Murió en 1558, en Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
